name: Creamed Peas and New Potatoes
recipeIngredient: 2 cups shelled peas or 1 (10 oz) package frozen peas
recipeInstructions:
1. Scrub the potatoes.
2. Remove a narrow strip of peel around the center of each potato.
3. Cook the potatoes until tender, then drain.
4. In a separate pan, cook the fresh peas until tender and drain.
5. Cook the onion in butter or margarine until tender.
6. Stir in the flour, salt, and pepper.
7. Add milk and continue cooking and stirring until thickened and bubbly.
8. Cook and stir for an additional 1 to 2 minutes.
9. Combine the cooked potatoes, peas, and onion mixture.
10. Makes 4 to 6 servings.
